description: Vite + TypeScript static PWA webapp with manifest and service worker baseline

notes: Builds on the static webapp scaffold and adds a production-oriented PWA baseline: manifest, service worker, icon placeholders, and immediate client registration.
Choose webapp-static when you want a simple static site without installability or offline contracts baked in.
Choose webapp-static-pwa when offline app-shell behavior, install metadata, and zero-backend PWA delivery are part of the baseline contract.
Use webapp-ssr-vite or webapp-ssr-next when server-rendered HTML or request-time SSR behavior is still required.
Includes the same importer-scoped lockfile, Buck/Nix, local-workspace Vite, and wasm watcher contracts as webapp-static.
